The '''m-68 planetary magnapulse cannon''' was a planetary weapon emplacement designed by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
The m-68 planetary magnapulse cannon was built with a large underground generator and a large rotating [[Plasma cannon/Legends|plasma cannon]] above the surface. The cannon fired plasma balls at the enemy vehicles, causing massive electrical disturbances that disabled the targets for a time.<ref name="EAWGG" />

==History==
Originally designed as a surface-to-space weapon, m-68 turned out to be more effective at surface-to-surface combat. The need for a surface-to-space weapon resulted in creation of the [[w-165 planetary turbolaser]].<ref name="EAWGG" /> Due to its high cost, m-68 was only deployed on a selected number of planets.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
